summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of Rivan Reality LLP Customer App. All 28 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend mobile flows verified: login (OTP autofill), home (7 properties + featured carousel + categories), property detail, interactive plot layout with 4-color status, plot detail modal with Book button, payments tab (12 installments, summary card, history), my-land (P-005 plot), visits (3 centres with Call/WhatsApp/Maps/Book), profile, documents (9 docs), services (10 types), notifications, wishlist (empty state), and admin dashboard (stats/bookings/services/users tabs). No critical bugs found.

issues: Deprecated 'shadow*' style props warnings in console (React Native Web). Should migrate to boxShadow. Cosmetic only, no visual impact.

action_items: (Optional polish) Migrate React Native shadow* style props to boxShadow to silence console warnings.
(Optional polish) Consider migrating props.pointerEvents to style.pointerEvents.
Nothing functional to fix. App is production-ready for the seeded demo scope.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses @app.on_event('startup') which is deprecated in FastAPI (use lifespan handlers). Functional but emits a warning.
Seed data uses fixed UUIDs only for some entities; document IDs and notification IDs are random and could complicate idempotent re-seed.
MongoDB queries correctly exclude _id via projection {'_id': 0} throughout. Good.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used the existing auto-seed (7 properties, 44 plots, 3 centres, demo user 9999900001, admin 9000000000).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully covered by /app/backend/tests/test_rivan_backend.py — re-run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_rivan_backend.py -v. The app uses Expo Router; navigate by direct URL paths (/payments, /myland, /visits, /profile, /documents, /services, /notifications, /wishlist, /admin, /layout/<propId>, /property/<propId>, /booking/<plotId>) instead of clicking bottom tabs because Expo Router tab bar buttons don't expose data-testid. Login flow: fill [data-testid=login-phone-input] -> click [login-send-otp-button] -> click [login-autofill-otp] -> click [login-verify-button]. OTP is always 123456.
